---
title: "Contact"
---

I'm happy to hear from students working toward graduate study, and from colleagues interested in the questions above.

**Email** — nidhi&nbsp;\[at\]&nbsp;econschool.in

**Department**

Division of Social Science\
New York University Abu Dhabi\
Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates

**Around the web**

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) <!-- TODO: replace with Nidhi's Scholar profile URL -->
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/) <!-- TODO: replace with Nidhi's ORCID URL, or delete this line -->
- [GitHub](https://github.com/nidhijain1705)

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## A note on the email format
The address is written as `nidhi [at] econschool.in` rather than a clickable link to cut down on automated scraping. To make it a normal clickable link instead, replace that line with `[nidhi@econschool.in](mailto:nidhi@econschool.in)`.
:::
